steps.title: Check domain and cross multiply
steps.content:
Choice C ($x=1$) makes $(x-1)=0$, so the left side is undefined—eliminate it.
Cross multiply the equation:
$$56x^2 = 81(x-1)(x+1)$$
Expand using $(x-1)(x+1) = x^2 - 1$:
$$56x^2 = 81(x^2-1)$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Expand the right side:
$$56x^2 = 81x^2 - 81$$
Rearrange:
$$25x^2 = 81$$
Divide by 25:
$$x^2 = \frac{81}{25}$$
Take the positive square root:
$$x = \frac{9}{5}$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
